headline: MTDR Strengthens Delaware Basin Footprint With Lease Acquisition
summary: Matador expands its Delaware Basin footprint with a $1.1B acreage deal aimed at boosting drilling inventory and cash flow.

headline: VIG Investors: Watch the 10-Year Treasury Yield This Week—4.75% Is the Danger Line
summary: The Vanguard Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares (NYSEARCA:VIG) is having a quieter year than its big-cap dividend-growth reputation suggests, with shares around $229 and a 5% year-to-date gain trailing the broader market. The 12-month picture is stronger at almost 17%, but the recent flattening tells you something important: VIG’s dividend-growth playbook is being squeezed ... VIG Investors: Watch the 10-Year Treasury Yield This Week—4.75% Is the Danger Line
